title: pilosella cymosa subsp. nestleri
intro: Pilosella cymosa subsp. nestleri, also known as the Alpine Hawk's Beard or Yellow Sow Thistle, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Pilosella cymosa subsp. nestleri include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
